transcript.text:
[City of Gochang, Jeollabuk-do]
Gochang is known for their eel
Also their honeydew melons
[I will have both of them]
[But you need to put in work]
[Well]
[What a beautiful sight]
[High sweetness level]
That's really good
I'm here to eat
Give me just 7 servings
3 more
Noodles too, please
[Eel]
[The famous Pungcheon Eel]
This is not mukbang

It's a Guinness World Record
[Gochang, Jeollabuk-do]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gochang today
There are a lot of famous foods here in Gochang
Their eel, watermelon,
Melons, etc
I'm going to harvest some melons before I head out for eel mukbang
[A place full of melons]
Hello
Hi Yay Tzuyang
[Welcome]
You've come a long way to promote our melons
It's so nice to see you
They're full of minerals because of the ochre soil
We get typhoons here and there because there's a beach nearby

The temperature between day and night is drastically different
So Gochang melons are exceptional in taste, scent, and texture compared to other melons
You're talking too much It's my turn
We're good friends
He has an earlier birthday We're born in the same year
He says that he's older
We're friends, but he's a younger brother
Help us today since you're here And go eat some eel
Really?
[Farmers here to see Tzuyang]
I saw her on television
She eats a lot
I'm sure she can eat 3 melons in 1 sitting
Will that be enough?
[Let's begin]
It's so heavy Wow

[Very experienced]
[How about Tzuyang?]
That stings
[She's doing her best]
[Unstable]
Help me
[Problem solved]
Should we have a taste?
[Open it up!]
[Mouth-watering visuals]
[Well?]
This is so sweet
Are they all from here?
They go out to the sorting area to get sent all over the country
[Having a conversation]
He's saying your pants are all ripped up

He wants to give you all the melons
It's been through a lot
[I'll have to buy new pants ^^]
[Honeydew sorting area]
[How sweet is it?]
[That's at a high level]
I got a chance to experience harvesting honeydew
It was for only a little bit, but my arms are worn out
A lot of our farmers go through a lot from harvesting and sorting these fruits
We're rooting for all the farmers
I'm here to eat now
Gochang is known for their Pungcheon eel
It's my very first time eating it here
I'm looking forward to it
[Seokjeong Pungcheon Eel] [Gochang, Jeollabuk-do]
Hello~

Thank you
How should I order the eels?
How many people will be eating?
By myself
Just 1 serving of this
1 eel is 1 serving?
Then...
Just 7 servings, please
7 servings you said?
[Is that right...?]
I'll prepare that for you
[We cook it for you]
[Grilled Eel]
7 eels
She can't eat it all
It's impossible

It will be our restaurant's record if she does it
Thank you
It looks so good
I'll cut it up for you
It stands up by itself
[Her cutting strategy is on point]
The grease will drip out this way
[Stand it up to drain out the oil]
Put the eel on the perilla leaf
Do you like ginger? No
If not, chives go really well with it
Bon appetit
The big chunks look so good
[So hot!!]
I didn't know it would be this hot!
It's so savory

Soy sauce this time They gave it to me
I've always had it with the thick eel sauce, not soy sauce
It's pretty good with soy sauce
[The hotness is not so good]
[Is she okay?]
So good
Eel's deep flavor I need to stop saying deep flavor
Very strong I need to stop saying that too
Whatever Let's just eat
I'll cool it down a bit
On my plate
It's so hot though
I really want to get a good taste!
You can't really relate eels to fish
Eels are eels
All mine

Delicious It's the best
Exhilarating
She said to wrap it with the perilla leaf
About 5 times
Let's go ahead and try it
With some chives too like she said
1 bite
Really tasty
Tail
Famous eel tail It'll give you strength
[Power up!]
[Let's grill another round]
It's perfect
[Perfectly covered]
Am I even on camera?
This thing's too big

Very big
Should I eat like this?
[World's first out-focused mukbang]
It's hot
Oh no!
I wasn't paying attention This part of the grill is hotter
I'm doing okay I just didn't know this part is hotter
[To the rescue]
It's an eel steak now
[New dish]
Thank you
That's hot!
I think there's sesame oil in here that's making it very nutty
It goes really well
Radish water kimchi
Unbelievable

Some garlic on top
Pickled garlic
[It's still hot]
How many are you at now?
This is my 4th one
Did you already eat that much?
How is it? Very delicious
Thank you No, thank you
3 pieces this time
[And of course]
This is too hot to be eaten right now
I'll eat it in a bit
[Last 2 eels on the grill]
[Neatly]
[Not]
My short temper is coming out

I'll eat this while I cool off this one
Let's try the whole eel now
I eat some foods as a whole sometimes
It just feels different sometimes ripping it off the whole thing
It's good
Trust me, it tastes different
Yummy
[I'm going to try it like that too!]
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside
[WIth some chives]
With some kimchi this time
The tail in 1 bite
Delicious
I have to order because I run out
Excuse me,
Can I have 3 more?

[What?]
You still have some left
Before I run out
[How will you eat it all?]
I'm watching her eat, yet I can't believe it
She's incredible
[Well in that case,]
I'll take Kalguksu as well (Noodle soup)
She wants Kalguksu too
[Clam Kalguksu]
Do they always come in this bowl?
I guess they give you big servings so that everyone can share
This is just how I like my Kalguksu
Let's put kimchi on here
It's going to be amazing with this delicious kimchi
So good

[Meanwhile at the other table]
It's a first and rare sighting to see 1 person eat this much
Should be on the Guinness World Records
Cooked it up for you since the charcoal was going low
Wow, this is 3 eels, right?
I'm worried that you'll get sick
I can eat more than this and be just fine
Why does this taste better? I love the scent
[The owner knows how to cook it properly]
[I need some dessert now]
I can get you some melon juice
Melon juice? I'd love that
Thank you
[Gochang's honeydew]
[You can't go wrong with it]
[Gochang melon juice]

[Just as she's in need of a new flavor]
Is this the melon juice? Yes
Thank you
That's good A strong melon flavor
[Gochang honeydew's sweetness]
[Finishing up the mukbang with melon juice!]
The end
This is not a mukbang
This needs to be on the Guinness World Records
I came to Gochang and ate grilled eels and honeydew melons
I enjoyed it so much
They are having a melon competition here in Gochang on September 4th at 2 pm
The melon that wins 1st place will be put up as an auction online
The money will be used as charity
So please show love and support
Thanks everyone

Hello It's Gochang Melon
She's gorgeous, right?
Our ocher-soil-grown melons are full of minerals
Excellent in sweetness, texture, and taste
We put over 1,000km stacks of hays in each greenhouse
Therefore, our melons are raised with beneficial bacteria with our soil
Great taste and scent
It looks beautiful as well
Show lots of love for ocher soil Gochang melons
Lots of love!
Show us some love! Thank you
My son.. we spent a lot of money on you. Money from our business
Please love our Gochang melons [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
